_comment: Human-facing pack settings for build-mrpack. All keys optional — each overrides its default source (modpack.json / build.gradle.kts / settings.gradle.kts / the map folder name). CLI flags (--name, --version) still win over this file. Delete a key to fall back to the default.

_notes.packVersion: null = read the mod version from build.gradle.kts; set a string to override the .mrpack version
_notes.packSlug: used for the output filename dist/<packSlug>-<version>.mrpack
_notes.mapName: renames the bundled world's save folder AND its in-game display name (level.dat LevelName); only applied when exactly one world is bundled
_notes.minecraft / fabricLoader: may also be set here to override modpack.json, but normally leave them there
